uiBuilder.label: MCOPE Score Card
uiBuilder.description: An MCOPE-analysis score card: title, score/risk badge (low/medium/high) and a configurable list of AI-generated sentiment bullets. Composes now-card.

properties.name: cardTitle
properties.label: Card title
properties.defaultValue: Overall Score Based on MCOPE Analysis

properties.name: titleSuffix
properties.label: Title suffix
properties.description: Muted text appended after the title (e.g. "(AI Generated)").

properties.name: showTitleSuffix
properties.label: Show title suffix
properties.description: Show or hide the title suffix.

properties.name: riskLabel
properties.label: Risk label
properties.description: Risk text shown in the badge (e.g. Medium Risk).

properties.name: badgeVariant
properties.label: Badge variant
properties.description: Severity colour of the score badge.

properties.name: sentimentsLabel
properties.label: Sentiments label
properties.description: Muted label shown above the bullet list.

properties.name: showSentimentsLabel
properties.label: Show sentiments label
properties.description: Show or hide the sentiments label.

properties.name: bulletPointsJson
properties.label: Bullet points
properties.description: Bullets as a JSON array, or as text split by the chosen delimiter. Leading -, *, • are stripped.

properties.name: bulletDelimiter
properties.label: Bullet delimiter
properties.description: How to split plain-text bullet input.

properties.name: bulletStyle
properties.label: Bullet style
properties.description: Marker style for the bullet list.

actions.name: MCOPE_SCORE_CARD_CLICKED
actions.label: MCOPE score card clicked
actions.description: Fired when the user clicks the card.

payload.name: scoreValue
payload.label: Score value
payload.description: The score shown in the badge.

payload.name: riskLabel
payload.label: Risk label
payload.description: The risk text in the badge.
